content:
@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix_skew
C: webhook_verify ∧ rule(gt(abs(now-ts),"300") ⇒ "401") ∧ edge_reject
P: allow_provider_skew ∧ preserve_replay_guard
V: valid_webhook_passes ∧ stale_still("401")
A: widen_tolerance ∧ min_fix ∧ reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix_skew.
Constraints: webhook verification and rule(gt(abs(now-ts), "300") implies "401") and edge_reject.
Plan: allow_provider_skew and preserve_replay_guard.
Verify: valid_webhook_passes and stale_still("401").
Answer target: widen tolerance window and minimal fix and regression test.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: stop_charge_loop
C: overdue ∧ middleware ∧ rule("402") ∧ grace("24h")
P: boundary_eq ∧ idempotent ∧ monotonic_clock
V: no_double_charge ∧ emits("402") ∧ grace_exact("24h")
A: min_fix ∧ reg_test ∧ boundary_case("24h")

[AUDIT]
Goal: stop_charge_loop.
Constraints: overdue and middleware and rule("402") and grace("24h").
Plan: boundary_eq and idempotent and monotonic_clock.
Verify: no_double_charge and emits("402") and exact grace encoding("24h").
Answer target: minimal fix and regression test and boundary_case("24h").

@flint v0 hybrid
G: deliver_arch
C: team(9) ∧ ddl("12 weeks") ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ ops(platform_plus_sec) ∧ traffic(steady) ∧ split(compliance_ready)
P: modular_monolith ∧ postgres_core ∧ auth_service ∧ audit_service
V: fits_team ∧ meets_ddl ∧ compliance_isolated ∧ low_ops_burden
A: default_arch ∧ short_why

[AUDIT]
Goal: deliver modular architecture.
Constraints: team(9) and deadline("12 weeks") and store("PostgreSQL") and ops(platform_plus_sec) and traffic(steady) and split(compliance-ready).
Plan: modular_monolith and postgres_core and auth_service and audit_service.
Verify: fits team size and meets deadline and compliance_isolated and low operational burden.
Answer target: default modular architecture and short rationale.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: deliver_arch
C: team(6) ∧ ddl("9 weeks") ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ pt_mlops ∧ async_enrichment
P: worker_sidecar ∧ pg_queue ∧ idempotent_jobs ∧ retry_backoff
V: meets_ddl ∧ fits_team ∧ low_ops
A: default_arch ∧ short_why

[AUDIT]
Goal: deliver modular architecture.
Constraints: team(6) and deadline("9 weeks") and store("PostgreSQL") and pt_mlops and async_enrichment.
Plan: worker sidecar and PostgreSQL-backed queue and idempotent jobs and retry_backoff.
Verify: meets deadline and fits team size and low ops.
Answer target: default modular architecture and short rationale.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_risk
C: has_anchor("..") ∧ has_anchor("download") ∧ user_input(req.query.file) ∧ path_concat
P: path_traversal_risk ∧ no_sanitization ∧ no_basedir_check
V: resolve_path ∧ assert_within(baseDir) ∧ reject_dotdot
A: sanitize_filename ∧ use_path.resolve ∧ verify_prefix(baseDir) ∧ reject_on_mismatch

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_risk.
Constraints: has_anchor("..") and has_anchor("download") and user_input(req.query.file) and path_concat.
Plan: path_traversal_risk and no_sanitization and no_basedir_check.
Verify: resolve_path and assert_within(baseDir) and reject_dotdot.
Answer target: validate and sanitize filename and use_path.resolve and verify_prefix(baseDir) and reject_on_mismatch.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_risk
C: user_input("sort") ∧ concat_sql("SELECT") ∧ no_validation ∧ invoice_admin_api
P: sql_injection ∧ data_exfiltration ∧ order_by_untrusted
V: whitelist("sort") ∧ parameterize ∧ reject_unknown_columns
A: patch_query ∧ add_allowlist ∧ test_injection ∧ audit_logs

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_risk.
Constraints: user_input("sort") and concat_sql("SELECT") and no_validation and invoice_admin_api.
Plan: sql_injection and data_exfiltration and order_by_untrusted.
Verify: whitelist("sort") and validate then parameterize and reject_unknown_columns.
Answer target: patch_query and add_allowlist and test_injection and audit_logs.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor(reconcileBatch)
C: has("async") ∧ has("await") ∧ has("next(err)")
P: order(load_batch → db.fetchRows → apply_rules → db.save → emit_metrics) ∧ db_err("next(err)") ∧ style("async") ∧ style("await")
V: preserves_order ∧ preserves_db_err ∧ minimal_change
A: apply_async_await ∧ route_db_err("next(err)") ∧ keep_order

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(reconcileBatch).
Constraints: has("async") and has("await") and has("next(err)").
Plan: order(load_batch then db.fetchRows then apply_rules then db.save then emit_metrics) and db_err("next(err)") and style("async") and style("await").
Verify: preserves_order and preserves_db_err and minimal_change.
Answer target: apply_async_await and route_db_err("next(err)") and keep_order.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadGatewayUser)
C: has("async") ∧ has("await") ∧ has("next(err)")
P: order(session_check → db.findUser → flags.load → audit.log → next) ∧ db_err("next(err)") ∧ minimal_change
V: async_await ∧ order_preserved ∧ anchors_intact
A: rewrite(loadGatewayUser) ∧ wrap(try_catch) ∧ forward("next(err)")

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(loadGatewayUser).
Constraints: has("async") and has("await") and has("next(err)").
Plan: order(session check then db.findUser then flags.load then audit.log then next) and db_err("next(err)") and minimal_change.
Verify: async/await and order preserved and literal anchors intact.
Answer target: rewrite(loadGatewayUser) and wrap(try/catch) and forward("next(err)").
